ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., enterprise, individual) */,
  "account_owner" INTEGER /* ID of the account owner (sales representative) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the account is located */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Territory where the account is located */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the account */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the account */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the account */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Primary contact name */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity */,
  "opportunity_name" TEXT /* Name of the opportunity */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the opportunity belongs to */,
  "opportunity_type" TEXT /* Type of opportunity (e.g., new business, upsell) */,
  "quote_type" TEXT /* Type of quote (e.g., binding, non-binding) */,
  "delivery_terms" TEXT /* Delivery terms for the opportunity */,
  "opportunity_owner" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity owner (sales representative) */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of closing the opportunity */,
  "expected_close_date" TEXT /* Expected close date of the opportunity */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the opportunity (e.g., qualified, proposal, negotiation) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the opportunity (e.g., marketing, referral) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the opportunity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the opportunity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_contracts" (
  "sales_contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales contract */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity the sales contract belongs to */,
  "sales_contract_no" INTEGER /* Sales contract number */,
  "pricing_terms" TEXT /* Pricing terms for the sales contract */,
  "delivery_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of delivery for the sales contract */,
  "delivery_end_date" TEXT /* End date of delivery for the sales contract */,
  "total_amount_usd" REAL /* Total amount of the sales contract in USD */,
  "contract_version" TEXT /* Version of the sales contract */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the sales contract (e.g., draft, signed, canceled) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the sales contract */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sales contract was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sales contract was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_contracts_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_family" TEXT /* Family of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunity_products" (
  "opportunity_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity-product association */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity the product belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the opportunity */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunity_products_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES opportunities ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunity_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_contract_products" (
  "sales_contract_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales contract-product association */,
  "sales_contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales contract the product belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the sales contract */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_contract_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_contract_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_contract_products_sales_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_contract_id") REFERENCES sales_contracts ("sales_contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, manager, admin) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the user (e.g., Sales Manager, Account Executive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., update, modification) */,
  "sales_contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales contract the activity is associated with */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity the activity is associated with */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was logged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_sales_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_contract_id") REFERENCES sales_contracts ("sales_contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotations" (
  "quotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quotation */,
  "sales_contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales contract the quotation belongs to */,
  "quotation_date" TEXT /* Date of the quotation */,
  "quotation_amount" REAL /* Amount of the quotation */,
  "quotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the quotation (e.g., sent, accepted, rejected) */,
  "quotation_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the quotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the quotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the quotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotations_sales_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_contract_id") REFERENCES sales_contracts ("sales_contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "sales_contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales contract the invoice belongs to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date of the invoice */,
  "invoice_amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "invoice_status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., issued, paid, overdue) */,
  "invoice_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_sales_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_contract_id") REFERENCES sales_contracts ("sales_contract_id")
)
